section.heading: Family child care providers

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: Not less frequently than quarterly, the Commandant shall ensure that each family child care provider is subject to inspection.

subsection.heading: Responsibility for Inspections.—
subsection.chapeau: Of the quarterly inspections under subsection (a) each year—

paragraph.content: 3 inspections shall be carried out by a representative of the Coast Guard installation served by the family child care provider concerned; and
1 inspection shall be carried out by a representative of the Coast Guard child development services work-life programs.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–283, div. G, title LVXXXII [LXXXII], § 8237(b)(1), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4665.)
